scenario_description: User asks agent to add speaker notes, then interrupts to organize files on Desktop, then asks to continue with slide transitions.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add speaker notes to slide 1: 'Welcome the audience and introduce the topic of probability.'
Actually, before continuing - can you create a folder called 'Presentations' on the Desktop and move this pptx file there?
Now open the file from its new location and add 'Author: Dr. Sarah Chen' as text on the first slide. Save.

result.command: python3 -c "import os; from pptx import Presentation; f='/home/user/Desktop/Presentations/The Birthday Paradox.pptx'; e=os.path.exists(f); p=Presentation(f) if e else None; t=' '.join(r.text for s in p.slides for sh in s.shapes if sh.has_text_frame for pa in sh.text_frame.paragraphs for r in pa.runs) if p else ''; print('PASSED' if e and 'Dr. Sarah Chen' in t else 'FAILED')"
